positive: A highly detailed, central composition of bioluminescent celestial forest flora and fauna. Focus on elegant, symmetrical geometric patterns forming stylized leaves, crystalline mushroom clusters, and flowing nebula clouds. The overall mood is magical and serene. Use deep indigo, cyan, violet, and vibrant electric green for bioluminescence accents against a dark, cosmic background. Strong contrast, clean vector-like silhouettes, perfect for apparel printing. Minimalist yet complex design, high contrast, 8k, concept art, smooth gradients, flat design influences.
negative: low resolution, noisy, grain, blurry, artifacts, amateur, cropped, signature, watermark, text, writing, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, muddy colors, grayscale, logo, trademark
